rooms.theater: Universal Cinema AMC at CityWalk Hollywood
quirks: THE BIG ONE - 377 seats, the largest auditorium surveyed, and the 6-7 story IMAX screen. Showtime was billed as IMAX 70mm.
Because the screen is so tall, the depth target is pushed to the BACK of the IMAX band (66-68%).
Room is 32 wide at the front, narrows to 24-25 in rows F/G, then widens to 29 for the back half - center seat moves 17 -> 13 -> 15.
Rows F has an aisle split; back row N is offset 175px left with 12 accessible positions.

rooms.theater: Universal Cinema AMC at CityWalk Hollywood
quirks: Seat 11 is dead center for rows A-G - a very forgiving room to book.
Rows E and G both carry accessible positions.
Back rows H and J have aisle splits and odd numbering (J: 12 seats numbered 1-16).

Row G has an aisle split.

gaps.theater: AMC Fashion Valley 18 / La Jolla 12 / Poway 10
gaps.note: No RealD 3D showtimes surfaced in the sampled window at these three; the standard Laser sample serves as the representative standard room for each.

AMC's region directory pages render their theatre lists via a map widget with no crawlable links, so discovery was done by probing known slugs. Confirmed and captured: Tustin 14, Fullerton 20, Anaheim GardenWalk 6. Other OC/Riverside AMCs (e.g. Victoria Gardens 12, Santa Anita 16, Marina Pacifica 12) were surfaced by the LA-area directory but not captured within this session's budget.
